problem_id: Two-Way Interoperability between the Single Window System and Department Systems
team_name: Event Ease – Smart Event Planning and Vendor Marketplace Platform
summary: Design a layer that facilitates two-way propagation of service requests using UBID as the common key between Karnataka's Single Window System and legacy department systems.
key_steps: Establish two-way propagation of service requests
optimization_claims: Improved efficiency in service request processing
Reduced errors due to manual data entry
constraints_addressed: Manual and time-consuming process of service request propagation
